song_title: Baby It's Cold Outside (feat. Christina Aguilera)
lyrics: i really cannot stay baby it is cold outside got to go away baby it is cold out there this evening has been been hoping that you would drop in so very nice hold your hands they are just like ice my mother will start to worry beautiful what is your hurry my father will be pacing the floor listen to that fireplace roar so really better scurry beautiful please do not hurry well maybe just a half a drink more why do not you put some records on while i pour the neighbors might think baby it is bad out there say what is in this drink no cabs to be had out there i wish i knew how your eyes are like starlight to break the spell take your hat your hair looks swell i ought to say no no no sir mind if i move in closer at least going to say that i tried the sense in hurting my pride i really cannot stay baby do not hold out baby it is cold outside i simply must go see that it is cold outside the answer is no i said it is cold out there this welcome has been how lucky that you dropped in so nice and warm look out the window at that storm my sister will be suspicious gosh your lips look delicious my brother will be there at the door waves upon a tropical shore my maiden aunt s mind is vicious oh your lips are delicious maybe just a cigarette more never such a blizzard before hey got to go home baby you will freeze out there say lend me your coat up to your knees out there really been grand thrilled when you touch my hand but do not you see how can you do this thing to me bound to be talk tomorrow think of my life long sorrow at least there will be plenty implied if you caught pneumonia and died i really cannot stay get over that old lie baby baby it is cold outside
gender_reasoning: The lyrics contain a mix of traditionally masculine and feminine terms, but the use of'my' and possessive pronouns, along with the speaker's mention of his mother, father, brother, sister, and aunt, suggest a masculine perspective. The speaker also uses terms of endearment such as 'baby' but in a way that is more common for a man addressing a woman in the 1940s.

lyrics: I have something to tell you that I've been wanting to say for a while but I've never found the right moment. I could do it here, I don't care if these people are laughing at me. I swear, the other night was amazing. You won't leave my mind. A single ring wouldn't be enough. You're worth more than any jewel. And who knows, when you leave, if you'll ever come back to me. Tell me if this feeling is mutual. Dance until, with your eyes closed, you give me a kiss and then apologize. Stay here just one second longer because I wanted to dedicate a thousand songs to you, written on a guitar that needs tuning, in those nights until the sun rises and you lose count of the hours. I wanted to dedicate to you what I feel and I don't know what it is that I feel. Let's not say forever because nothing lasts forever. If you believe too much in dreams, they might wake you up at the best part. Everything seems like déjà vu. A thousand words on TV, Coca Cola and Malibu. Let's dance like a tribe. And who knows, when you leave, if you'll ever come back to me. Tell me if this feeling is mutual. Dance until, with your eyes closed, you give me a kiss and then apologize. Stay here just one second longer because I wanted to dedicate a thousand songs to you, written on a guitar that needs tuning, in those nights until the sun rises and you lose count of the hours. I wanted to dedicate to you what I feel and I don't know what it is that I feel. I don't know how to serenade. Dark nights, asereje. I don't follow trends but I go back to vinyl. I don't know if Maradona was better than Pelé but women's soccer is definitely more virile. Women against men, we both serve even if we're different like husky eyes. I love the inconsistent ones. You leave like Heidi, you undress like Miley, all made up like Billie Eilish. When you're close, you're argumentative. Oh, when you're far away, you're America. You make my poetic vein flow like Lucio Dalla. My hand that writes a dedication to you. I think of you and the words come out in meter. It's easy to find them like grass on Telegram. Here lies are for sale and you are the truth serum, better than pentothal. The feeling that sometimes comes over me is that we're doing well, like beaches and tides, like boats on the horizon. We get lost among the waves. Good and evil blend in our shadows until the sun rises, you lose count of the hours. I wanted to dedicate to you what I feel and I don't know what it is that I feel. I don't know what it is. I wanted to dedicate to you what I feel and I don't know what it is that I feel.
